News

End of Term Report - Easter 2025

Thursday, 2 April, 2026
As we approach Easter, I wanted to update you on my work in my latest End of Term Report. End of Term Report - Easter 2026 I hope this will be of interest and as always, if there are any issues you would like to bring to my attention, do not hesitate to get in touch. Finally, I hope that everyone can spend some time with their families over Easter and Passover and enjoy the sense of hope and...
